'''kakungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylocarp|xylocarp]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-k-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylocarp|xylocarp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kakungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kækingith|kækingith]] || [[word:kækingij|kækingij]] || [[word:kækingish|kækingish]] || [[word:kækingi|kækingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kakukunguth|kakukunguth]] || [[word:kakukunguj|kakukunguj]] || [[word:kakukungush|kakukungush]] || [[word:kakukungu|kakukungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kakunguth|kakunguth]] || [[word:kakunguj|kakunguj]] || [[word:kakungush|kakungush]] || [[word:kakungu|kakungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kakufnguth|kakufnguth]] || [[word:kakufnguj|kakufnguj]] || [[word:kakufngush|kakufngush]] || [[word:kakufnguf|kakufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kakunguthu|kakunguthu]] || [[word:kakunguju|kakunguju]] || [[word:kakungushu|kakungushu]] || [[word:kakunguku|kakunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kakunguth|kakunguth]] || [[word:kakunguj|kakunguj]] || [[word:kakungush|kakungush]] || [[word:kakungu|kakungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kakunguthul|kakunguthul]] || [[word:kakungujul|kakungujul]] || [[word:kakungushul|kakungushul]] || [[word:kakungukul|kakungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kakunguthuthu|kakunguthuthu]] || [[word:kakungujuju|kakungujuju]] || [[word:kakungushushu|kakungushushu]] || [[word:kakunguku|kakunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kakunguthun|kakunguthun]] || [[word:kakungujun|kakungujun]] || [[word:kakungushun|kakungushun]] || [[word:kakungukun|kakungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kakunguthuoro|kakunguthuoro]] || [[word:kakungujuoro|kakungujuoro]] || [[word:kakungushuoro|kakungushuoro]] || [[word:kakungukuoro|kakungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
